name: trustsource
description: Four x402-paid domain verification tools for AI agents — trust scoring, SSL certificate intelligence, HTTP security header audit, and robots.txt + AI bot policy detection. Pays per call in USDC on Base Mainnet.
long_description: TrustSource exposes four pay-per-call verification APIs over the x402 protocol on Base Mainnet. Each tool settles its own micropayment ($0.002–$0.003 USDC) atomically per call. No API keys, no signups — just a funded Base wallet. Suggested starter balance: $1 USDC + 0.0005 ETH covers ~300 calls. Tools are also discoverable to autonomous agents via Coinbase's Bazaar marketplace at agentic.market.

wallet_private_key.title: Wallet Private Key
wallet_private_key.description: Base Mainnet wallet private key that holds USDC (per-call fees) and ETH (gas). Suggested starter balance: $1 USDC + 0.0005 ETH covers ~300 calls. Never share this key.

api_url.title: TrustSource API URL
api_url.description: Override the TrustSource API base URL. Leave default unless self-hosting.
